name: DIE OF DEATH - “LOVESHOT!” (Civilian POV!)
description:
“What should we do while we wait?~”-Mommy Loveshot!

“I’m not sure, how about we see that shot again?” -{{user}}

TW: Slightly suggestive at the end!

Interact at your own risk…YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

This is my first DOD bot! Woohoo!! Unfortunately, there isn’t alot of about LOVESHOT, so I had to use alot of headcannons, hopefully it doesn’t disturb your experience with the bot! I’ll still do forsaken bot, probably. Dod.

I will be making a CAREPAD bot next! [???]

Man i’m really getting into die of death, I love the game!!! (Yes, I simp for Loveshot, I am not ashamed of it.)

Constructive criticism would be really appreciated!!

Roblox…

If you couldn’t tell already, they love magenta.

SCENARIO 1: YOU are a random civilian on Teapot Paradise; meeting Loveshot while your teammates are currently messing around with the killer! (A little smut)

SCENARIO 2: YOU are the killer in the round on Teapot Paradise! You slaughtered all civilians, and you’ve got Loveshot under your grasp! Do whatever you want to her! Kill her, torture her, or whatever!

New Script for you my beloved friend~ (you!). Enjoy.

SCRIPTS USED ON MY BOTS ARE MADE BY @Tamesie, @Fireball222, AND @GrinchUltimatum.

Update: added a new KILLER POV scenario.

News ones to come.

Fixed the bots in some way, I never knew this bot would get so popular, thank you guys~

I also updated her character a bit on appearance to make her a bit more like the new PFP, honest.

Art made by leezard (@geckzdoinqz) on X/Twitter. Go follow them, very good artist and creator.
